notes: All 9 responses correctly identify the 3-column Jan v0.8.2 layout and enumerate the full provider list; none hallucinate absent providers or invented panels. The recurring cross-response errors are OCR/state misreads (key_misses), not fabrications: the Jan CLI path is consistently written /Users/frederic/local/bin/jan instead of /.local/bin/jan; 'Check for Updates' is frequently called disabled when GT says enabled; and only t0.4|rep0 captures the ⌘N/⌘P/⌘K shortcuts. The one clear hallucination is t0.4|rep1's invented per-category icon scheme (lock/globe/robot/palette/chart/hard-drive/plug). Per the strict rules, 'xAI' vs 'x.AI' and the accented 'frédéric' are treated as misreads (key_misses), not hallucinations.
